prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约9008→9258→9828→11271→10983名，整体呈后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1975名；2025年较2024年小幅回升288名，显示止跌企 稳迹象；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021年27人、2022年38人、2023–2025年均为41人；2026年计划37人，较2025年减少4人（-9.8%），缩招将加剧 竞争，推动位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第107名，近年排名稳定在103–109名区间，学校层次无明显变化；该校未出现在近年声誉舆情监测中，无明显正面或负面事件；抖音热度排名第93位（一般），短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未形成报考热度推升效应；第五轮 学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，缺乏顶尖学科吸引力；但电气工程、机械工程、材料科学等传统工科有一定积淀。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通 信等专业社会热度持续升温（高热推荐），计算机类仍为推荐方向，这些专业在河北工大均有招生，对考生有一定吸引力；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数167,000人，较2025年1 72,114人减少约3.0%，竞争略有缓解；河北工业大学位于天津市，隶属河北省，是河北省唯一211高校，在黑龙江省招生 占比约2.17%（2025年），招生规模较小，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次止跌企稳、2026年缩招9.8%推动位次前移、考生总数小幅减少缓解竞争、 以及学校层次稳定等因素，考虑缩招效应但2025年位次回升趋势表明报考热度略有恢复，小幅上调预测值；预测2026年物 理类最低位次约10390名，区间9890–10890名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 9008 → 9258 → 9828 → 11271 → 10983, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1975 places in the past 4 years; in 2025, there was a slight rebound of 288 places compared to 2024, indicating signs of stabilization; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 27 students in 2021, 38 in 2022, and 41 from 2023 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 37 students, a decrease of 4 students (-9.8%) compared to 2025, and the enrollment reduction will intensify competition, pushing rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 107th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 103–109 in recent years, showing no significant change in university level; the university has not appeared in recent reputation monitoring, with no significant positive or negative events; Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd (average), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, not forming a boost in application popularity; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, lacking top-tier discipline appeal; however, traditional engineering fields such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science have some accumulation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication have continuously rising social popularity (highly recommended), and Computer Science remains a recommended direction; these majors are offered at Hebei University of Technology, attracting some applicants; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province General College Entrance Examination is 167,000, a decrease of about 3.0% from 172,114 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin City, under the jurisdiction of Hebei Province, and is the only 211 university in Hebei Province; its enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.17% (2025), with a small enrollment scale, and regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of rankings in 2025, the 9.8% enrollment reduction in 2026 pushing rankings forward, a slight decrease in total candidates easing competition, and the stable university level, the prediction is adjusted upward slightly due to the enrollment reduction effect but the rebound trend in 2025 rankings indicates a slight recovery in application popularity; the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 10390, with a range of 9890–10890.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information Engineering (Artificial Intelligence New Engineering Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Accounting
- Chemical Engineering and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Metallic Materials Engineering, Inorganic Nonmetallic Materials Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Polymer Materials and Engineering
- Environmental Engineering
- Industrial Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9890–10890, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9890), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>10890), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
